build.beforeBuildCommand: rm -rf .next && npx next build && cp src-tauri/standalone/server.js .next/standalone/server.js && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && mkdir -p .next/standalone/node_modules/sql.js/dist && cp node_modules/sql.js/dist/*.wasm .next/standalone/node_modules/sql.js/dist/ && mkdir -p .next/standalone/node_modules/html2canvas/dist && cp -r node_modules/html2canvas/dist/* .next/standalone/node_modules/html2canvas/dist/ && cp node_modules/html2canvas/package.json .next/standalone/node_modules/html2canvas/ && mkdir -p .next/standalone/data .next/standalone/public/uploads && cp reading-tracker-books.json .next/standalone/data/ 2>/dev/null; cp reading-tracker-tags.json .next/standalone/data/ 2>/dev/null && rm -f .next/standalone/data/library.db && find .next/standalone/public/uploads -type f -delete && rm -rf .next/standalone/src-tauri && rm -f src-tauri/standalone/standalone.tar.gz && mkdir -p src-tauri/standalone && cd .next/standalone && tar czf ../../src-tauri/standalone/standalone.tar.gz . && echo 'standalone prepared'
